G506.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G5293 (ὑποτάσσω);
G506.strongs_def: unsubdued, i.e. insubordinate (in fact or temper)

G540.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3962 (πατήρ);

G563.derivation: adverb from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative participle) and a presumed derivative of G4049 (περισπάω);

G564.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4059 (περιτέμνω);

G574.derivation: adverb from G573 (ἁπλοῦς) (in the objective sense of G572 (ἁπλότης));

G565.strongs_def: to go off (i.e. depart), aside (i.e. apart) or behind (i.e. follow), literally or figuratively
G565.kjv_def: come, depart, go (aside, away, back, out, … ways), pass away, be past

G521.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G3811 (παιδεύω);

G554.strongs_def: to divest wholly oneself, or (for oneself) despoil

G573.strongs_def: properly, folded together, i.e. single (figuratively, clear)

G546.strongs_def: to menace; by implication, to forbid

G512.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G5624 (ὠφέλιμος);

G583.strongs_def: to write off (a copy or list), i.e. enrol

G558.strongs_def: one freed away, i.e. a freedman

G511.strongs_def: upper, i.e. (neuter as adverb) to a more conspicuous place, in a former part of the book

G508.strongs_def: above the ground, i.e. (properly) the second floor of a building; used for a dome or a balcony on the upper story

G572.strongs_def: singleness, i.e. (subjectively) sincerity (without dissimulation or self-seeking), or (objectively) generosity (copious bestowal)

G517.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3707 (ὁρατός);

G570.strongs_def: faithlessness, i.e. (negatively) disbelief (lack of Christian faith), or (positively) unfaithfulness (disobedience)

G532.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G3903 (παρασκευάζω);

G503.derivation: from a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G3788 (ὀφθαλμός);

G518.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος);
G518.kjv_def: bring word (again), declare, report, shew (again), tell

G562.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a secondary derivative of G4008 (πέραν);

G530.strongs_def: one (or a single) time (numerically or conclusively)

G561.strongs_def: from in front, i.e. opposite, before or against
G561.kjv_def: before, contrary, over against, in the presence of

G526.strongs_def: to estrange away, i.e. (passively and figuratively) to be non-participant

G593.strongs_def: to disapprove, i.e. (by implication) to repudiate

G528.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G473 (ἀντί);

G591.strongs_def: to give away, i.e. up, over, back, etc. (in various applications)
G591.kjv_def: deliver (again), give (again), (re-)pay(-ment be made), perform, recompense, render, requite, restore, reward, sell, yield
G591.usage: pay(9x), give(9x), render(9x), reward(7x), sell(3x), yield(2x)

G541.derivation: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G826 (αὐγάζω);

G578.strongs_def: to look away from everything else, i.e. (figuratively) intently regard

G577.strongs_def: to throw off; figuratively, to lose

G588.strongs_def: to take fully, i.e. welcome (persons), approve (things)

G536.derivation: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G756 (ἄρχομαι);
G536.strongs_def: a beginning of sacrifice, i.e. the (Jewish) first-fruit (figuratively)

G575.strongs_def: "off," i.e. away (from something near), in various senses (of place, time, or relation; literal or figurative)
G575.kjv_def: (X here-)after, ago, at, because of, before, by (the space of), for(-th), from, in, (out) of, off, (up-)on(-ce), since, with

G551.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G3987 (πειράω);

G579.strongs_def: cast off, i.e. (figuratively) such as to be rejected

G519.strongs_def: akin to the base of G43 (ἀγκάλη)); to strangle oneself off (i.e. to death)

G509.strongs_def: from above; by analogy, from the first; by implication, anew
G509.kjv_def: from above, again, from the beginning (very first), the top

G520.kjv_def: bring, carry away, lead (away), put to death, take away

G589.kjv_def: go (travel) into a far country, journey

G576.derivation: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G939 (βάσις);
